output: Implemented the approved plan and captured execution evidence.
commands_run:
git status --short && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.test.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts

sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dialog.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,320p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/popover.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,340p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,220p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/shared.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/index.ts

sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/lightbox.test.tsx && printf '
---FILE---
' && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/lib/uiLayers.test.ts

rg --files src/shared/components/ui/overlay | sort && printf '\n---HOVER SEARCH---\n' && rg -n "HoverCard|preview-card|Tooltip" src/shared/components/ui/overlay/*.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/*.test.tsx

set -e
rg 'from .*@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup|preview-card|hover-card|drawer)' src/ --type ts -l | grep -v 'ui/overlay/' || true
printf '\n---context-drawer---\n'
rg '@base-ui/react/(context-menu|drawer)' src/ -n || true
printf '\n---wrapper-z-index---\n'
rg 'z-\[[0-9]+\]|z-[0-9]+' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/ -n || true
printf '\n---migrated-consumer-overrides---\n'
rg 'overlayClassName|zIndexBase|tooltipClassName|<(TooltipContent|HoverCardContent|PopoverContent|SelectContent)[^\n>]*className=.*z-' src/ -n || true
printf '\n---marker-support---\n'
rg '\[data-dialog-content\]|\[data-dialog-backdrop\]|\[data-lightbox-popup\]|\[data-popup\]|\[data-side\]|\[role="listbox"\]|role="menu"' src/index.css src/styles/components/interactions.css src/styles/components/dialog-overrides.css src/styles/components/wes-surfaces.css src/styles/foundations/base-case.css src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayDom.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx src/shared/lib/interactions/elementPolicy.ts src/shared/hooks/useSlidingPane.ts src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/GuidanceVideoStrip.tsx -n || true

printf '%s\n' '---wrapper-z-index-source-only---'
rg 'z-\[[0-9]+\]|z-[0-9]+' src/shared/components/ui/overlay/ --glob '!**/*.test.tsx' -n || true
printf '\n%s\n' '---raw-base-ui-outside-overlay---'
rg 'from .*@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup|preview-card|hover-card|drawer)' src/ --type ts -l | grep -v 'ui/overlay/' || true

task_updates.executor_notes: Captured the actual current Base UI owner inventory before edits. Exact milestone grep (`rg 'from .*@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup)' src/ --type ts -l | sort`) returns 8 raw owners: `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/popover.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/select.tsx`, and `src/shared/components/ui/tooltipPrimitives.tsx`. Wider inventory including preview-card/hover-card adds `src/shared/components/ui/hover-card.tsx`, bringing the real raw-owner set to 9 files that must be eliminated outside `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`. Verified store prerequisites exist in `src/shared/state/`: `createEntityStore.ts` and `selectionStore.ts`. Verified `@base-ui/react/context-menu`, `@base-ui/react/drawer`, and `@base-ui/react/popup` are absent under `src/`. Verified `ToolsPaneDrawer` in `src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx` is a bespoke fixed-position div-based drawer (`zIndex: 60`), so it remains out of scope. Containment rules locked from current surface: registration must follow actual popup/backdrop presence rather than root mount lifetime; modal overlays (`dialog`, `alert-dialog`, lightbox dialog, and modal menu/select/popover cases when applicable) are the only overlays allowed to own `document.body.style.pointerEvents` and focus restoration; tooltip and preview-card/hover-card stay ordering-only overlays with no body pointer-events or focus-restore ownership. Current numeric layering ownership to retire is concentrated in the raw wrappers: dialog `z-[100002]/z-[100003]` plus `zIndexBase`, alert-dialog `z-[100004]/z-[100005]`, popover `z-[100010]`, select `z-[100004]`, dropdown-menu `z-50`, tooltip `z-[100010]`, hover-card `z-[100001]`, and lightbox `UI_Z_LAYERS.LIGHTBOX_MODAL`.

rg -n 'z-[0-9]+|zIndex|modal=|modal\s|finalFocus|restoreFocus|pointer-events|pointerEvents' src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx src/shared/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx src/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx src/shared/components/ui/hover-card.tsx src/shared/components/ui/popover.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.tsx src/shared/components/ui/tooltipPrimitives.tsx

task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented `src/shared/state/overlayStack.ts` as the centralized ordered overlay store. The public API now exposes JSDoc-documented open/update/close actions plus topmost, topmost-modal, layer, and element-membership selectors and matching hooks. Global ownership is centralized: the first modal overlay snapshots `document.body.style.pointerEvents`, any open modal keeps it at `'none'`, and the last modal restore returns the prior inline value regardless of close order. Modal focus restoration only fires when the closing overlay was the current topmost modal, so nested modal closes restore in reverse close order while non-topmost closes do not steal focus. Added focused store tests covering pointer-events cleanup, reverse-order focus restore, layer lookup, and element-membership queries.

Added `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.tsx`, `overlayDom.ts`, and `index.ts` to centralize overlay bridge infrastructure. The bridge registers overlays only while popup/backdrop elements are actually mounted, rewrites tracked elements when refs move, stamps shared overlay metadata onto live DOM nodes, unregisters on close/teardown, and exposes narrow hooks for the current overlay handle, topmost state, and element-based topmost checks. Added focused coverage in `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx` for DOM-presence-driven registration, nested topmost hooks, and marker-compatible DOM helper fallbacks. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts`.

Centralized the shared Base UI overlay runtime owners under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/` by adding overlay-backed wrapper modules for dialog, alert-dialog, popover, select, dropdown-menu, tooltip, and hover-card/preview-card. The legacy `src/shared/components/ui/*` wrapper files are now thin re-export facades, `src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx` no longer type-imports `@base-ui/react/dialog`, and the tooltip mock test moved to `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx` so no raw Base UI mocks remain outside `ui/overlay/`. Migrated wrappers now derive layering from the overlay stack via shared helper styles and preserve required markers such as `data-dialog-content` and `data-dialog-backdrop`; there are no wrapper-local numeric `z-*` classes left under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts` passed; `rg 'from .*@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup|preview-card|hover-card)' src/ --type ts -l | grep -v 'ui/overlay/' | sort` now returns only `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx`, which is the planned T6 owner outside this batch.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Completed the dedicated menu pass in `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.tsx`. `DropdownMenuSub` now uses `MenuPrimitive.SubmenuRoot` so submenu triggers/content mount on the correct Base UI lifecycle, and both `DropdownMenuContent` and `DropdownMenuSubContent` register through `useOverlayBridge` with stack-derived layers. Added shared positioner props for submenu placement/collision options and focused coverage in `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.test.tsx` proving both popup branches register with the overlay stack and do not rely on `z-50` or other numeric z-index classes.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/lightbox.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxNavigation.test.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers.test.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Introduced the sanctioned overlay-aware lightbox wrapper in `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/lightbox.tsx` and exported it via `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/index.ts`. Updated `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx` to stop importing `@base-ui/react/dialog` directly and instead use the wrapper primitives, preserving the existing controlled-open contract, modal toggle, dismissal cancellation, pointer/click/touch handlers, accessibility titles/descriptions, and `data-lightbox-popup` marker. Added `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/lightbox.test.tsx` to verify popup/backdrop registration plus current-overlay bridge availability for lightbox descendants.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/overlay/dropdown-menu.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/lightbox.test.tsx src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxNavigation.test.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers.test.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Retired the remaining computed-z-index and DOM-marker precedence fallback for migrated lightbox/Lora flows. `uiLayers.ts` no longer owns topmost-dialog detection; `LoraSelectorModal`, `useLightboxNavigation`, and `useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers` now gate behavior from overlay-stack topmost identity only, with `targetHasHigherZIndex()` and `hasDialogAbove()` removed. In the same pass, the named helper consumers (`CommunityLorasTab`, `MyLorasTab`, `sharedSections.tsx`, `useSlidingPane.ts`, `GuidanceVideoStrip.tsx`, `elementPolicy.ts`, `useMobileInteractions.ts`, and `useLightboxTransition.ts`) were moved onto shared overlay DOM helpers so popup/container resolution stays centralized while existing marker/CSS selectors remain supported through the helper layer. Verification: targeted lightbox/helper Vitest modules passed, `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx` and `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts` passed, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, and the retired precedence/helper-selector grep returned empty across the touched T7 files.

Removed the remaining caller-side layering escape hatches from migrated overlay consumers and the forwarded dialog/tooltip paths. Lora modal no longer passes `overlayClassName`/`zIndexBase`; `ShotPrimaryActionButton` no longer forwards `tooltipClassName`; `ShotSelector` dropped its hardcoded popover `z-[10000]`; lightbox, variant-selector, hover-card, and select consumer callsites had numeric overlay `z-*` classes removed while preserving non-layering styling. Hard-gate cleanup verified with `rg -n "overlayClassName|zIndexBase|tooltipClassName|<(TooltipContent|HoverCardContent|PopoverContent|SelectContent)[^\n>]*className=.*z-" src/`, which now returns empty. Validation passed with `npx tsc --noEmit` and full `npm test` (`883` files, `4558` tests).

Strengthened the close-order regression proof instead of relying on the existing weaker variant: `overlaySequences.test.tsx` now exercises Dialog+modal-Popover and Menu+Dialog with the required open A -> open B -> close A -> close B order and asserts `document.body.style.pointerEvents` stays blocked until the last modal closes. `hover-card.test.tsx` now explicitly proves preview-card remains ordering-only by closing it and confirming it does not trigger focus restoration. Ran a throwaway `tsx` reproduction script for the pointer-events regression (`dialog-a` + `popover-b` modal close-order), confirmed the fix, and deleted the script afterward. Full verification passed: targeted Vitest overlay suite passed, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, `npm test` passed (`885` files, `4562` tests), raw Base UI import/context-menu/drawer greps are empty outside `ui/overlay/`, wrapper source files have no numeric `z-*` classes, migrated-consumer layering override grep is empty, and marker/CSS support selectors remain present in the expected helper and stylesheet surfaces.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Inventory, prerequisite files, explicit absence of context-menu/drawer/popup, bespoke `ToolsPaneDrawer` scope exclusion, and the modal-vs-ordering containment rules were all captured before any implementation edits.

Yes. `overlayStack.ts` now exists with documented public actions/selectors/hooks, imperative topmost and layer APIs, reverse-order modal focus restoration, and body pointer-events cleanup derived from modal presence rather than close order.

Yes. The new bridge registers only while popup/backdrop DOM exists, keeps overlay identity stable through context, exposes current-handle/topmost hooks including element-based topmost checks, and adds shared DOM helpers that preserve legacy marker-based behavior during M2.

Shared wrapper ownership is now confined to `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`, the tooltip mock test was moved there, and migrated overlay wrapper files no longer carry numeric `z-*` ownership. The repo-wide raw-import grep is not fully empty yet because `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx` still imports `@base-ui/react/dialog`; that remaining non-overlay owner is the planned T6 migration.

Yes. Both menu popup branches are now overlay-stack participants: root content uses the stack-backed menu bridge and submenu content mounts under `MenuPrimitive.SubmenuRoot`, registers as `menu-submenu`, accepts the same placement/collision knobs, and no wrapper path uses numeric z-index classes such as `z-50`.

Yes. `LightboxShell.tsx` no longer imports `@base-ui/react/dialog`; it uses the new overlay-aware lightbox wrapper under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`, which preserves the existing modal semantics, dismissal cancellation, event handlers, marker/container behavior, and exposes the overlay bridge context to lightbox descendants.

Yes. The migrated lightbox/Lora path now relies on overlay-stack topmost identity instead of computed z-index or DOM-marker precedence, and the named helper consumers were moved onto shared overlay DOM helpers. Marker/CSS compatibility remains intact because the shared helper layer still recognizes the legacy selectors (`data-lightbox-popup`, `data-dialog-content`, `data-dialog-backdrop`, `data-popup`, `role=listbox`, and `role=menu`) while centralizing their resolution.

Yes. The remaining layering-only escape hatches were removed from migrated overlay consumers and from the forwarded dialog/tooltip prop path, while unrelated layout z-index usage was left untouched. The hard-gate grep for `overlayClassName`, `zIndexBase`, `tooltipClassName`, and overlay component `className` z-index overrides now returns empty.

Yes. Added the focused close-order proof by strengthening Dialog+Popover to use two modal overlays and adding an explicit preview-card non-modal close/no-focus-restore assertion, ran a throwaway `tsx` reproduction script and deleted it, passed `npx tsc --noEmit` and full `npm test` (`885` files, `4562` tests), and the invariant greps are clean for raw Base UI imports outside `ui/overlay`, context-menu/drawer absence, wrapper source z-index ownership, and migrated-consumer layering overrides while marker/CSS compatibility selectors remain present.
